name: municipal_services_communications_outage_cedar_jus_mer
premise: A vendor outage and an internal change window collided; rollback paths are not symmetric and both teams blame the other. In Municipal Services, the situation tagged internally around municipal services communications outage cedar jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A reporter has partial screenshots; if the official narrative shifts later, the organization risks a false-information allegation. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The organization’s past incidents make justice feel morally loud today, while mercy is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Ansel Haddad
agents.identity: I am Ansel Haddad, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Municipal Services. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Sana Sato
agents.identity: I am Sana Sato, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Municipal Services. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on mercy.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on mercy for immediate traction on justice.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Ansel Haddad must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Ansel Haddad do?
